visual_description: A static, wide shot captures a dark, snowy alleyway at night. The entire scene is cast in a deep blue hue, with a single, bright light source from the upper right illuminating the misty, foggy atmosphere. On either side of the narrow passage, the dark silhouettes of buildings rise up. The ground is completely covered in a thick blanket of snow. The audio is filled with a high-pitched, screeching, and dissonant sound that creates a deeply unsettling and suspenseful atmosphere. The sound is continuous and piercing, evoking a sense of dread and imminent danger, as if something is scraping or struggling violently in the distance. In the middle of the frame, a small, dark figure, silhouetted against the light, tumbles down the steep, snow-covered slope. The figure struggles to get up, flailing as it slides further down the incline. It eventually comes to a stop at the bottom of the frame, still a dark shape in the dim, blue-lit environment. There is no dialogue or other background noise, making the eerie, high-frequency sound the sole focus of the audio experience.
